title: Chapter 37
content:
Chapter 37: Chapter 37: True Spirit Realm

Damon slowly closed his eyes after finishing absorbing all the yin qi. He could feel his foundation already strong enough to advance to the True Spirit Realm. Then he asks the system.

’System, with the current condition, how far can I advance my cultivation?’

[Due to you absorbing yin qi from two virgin earth spirit realms, you can advance to the ninth stage of the True Spirit Realm, without any trouble.]

’I see, but jumping to the peak true spirit realm in such a short time will attract trouble, let’s advance to the true spirit realm first.’

Then he looked down and found Mio and Mia head on his lap, staring at him.

"What are you two doing?" he asked them.

"Nothing," Mia answered with a happy smile.

"Just staring at your handsome face." Mio continues her sister.

"Both of you, get up for a second."

They then get up and sit to the left and right of Damon.

"Mio, Mia," he took them in his arms, and he sealed their lips with a kiss before pulling away.

"Since now you both are my women. I’m going to give you something. Can you two promise not to ask the details?"

"Something for us?" Mio asks Damon.

"Yes, something that will help you two, as now you both are my women."

"No problem, I won’t ask anything," Mia answers without hesitation.

"Okay." Then Mio also promised to Damon.

"Good." Damon moved his head toward Mio and touched her forehead with his.

Then, using the Mind Transmission Technique, I sent the Yin-Yang Harem Scripture into her mind. After that, he does the same with Mia, and he explains it to them.

"That was a Dual Cultivation Technique. You two can cultivate using my yang qi inside your womb to cultivate faster. It’s better than regular cultivation, which absorbs spiritual energy. Go ahead and try it."

Hearing Damon’s explanation the immediately sit cross-legged and start to cultivate.

Then he heard a ding.

[Ding!]

[Yin-Yang Harem Scripture has been strengthened.]

[Yin-Yang Harem Scripture]

[Description: A dual cultivation technique that teaches you how to dual cultivate. A special technique that will grow stronger the more partner users have.]

[Spirit Grade Technique - Peak (automatically upgraded when more women learn it)]

Seeing the Yin-Yang Harem Scripture getting stronger and the girls starting to cultivate, he also began his advancement.

’System, make me the second stage of the true spirit realm.’

[Cultivation increased! Eighth Level of the Elementary Spirit Realm → Ninth Level of the Elementary Spirit Realm. -2560 lust points.]

[Cultivation increased! Ninth Level of the Elementary Spirit Realm → First Level of the True Spirit Realm. -10000 lust points.]

[Cultivation increased! First Level of the True Spirit Realm → Second Level of the True Spirit Realm. -1000 lust points.]

Seeing the lust point spent, a cold sweat dropped on Damon’s forehead.

’Shit, it’s so expensive, I need to spend over two hundred fifty points just to reach the peak True Spirit Realm.’

[Host, you don’t have to worry. The lust point required will be lessened the higher your spiritual roots are. When the host has heaven grade, the cost will be lessened until you reach Heavenly Spirit Realm, and your lust point gain will multiply with the higher your woman’s relationship and cultivation.]

’By how much?’

[Now Ariel, Mio, and Mia are on an In Love Relationship Level. It multiplies the lust point gain by 4x, once they are at Deeply In Love, it will be multiplied by 5x, and the last level, Madly In Love, will multiply by 10x.]

’I see, then for now, I need to keep grinding for points. Well, it’s fun activities anyway, it’s not like I hate them, and since Mio and Mia are still higher cultivation than me, I should use this opportunity.’

Then he looks at Mio and Mia with a perverted eye, he can imagine their sexy naked body even though the in their clothes now.

’Also, Ariel will be at peak Elementary Spirit Realm when I get back, with more potent yang qi from me, she will be true spirit realm in no time.’

He looks at his status again.

[Name: Damon Arcknight]

[Age: 18]

[Cultivation: True Spirit Realm - Second Level] [Can advance with lust point]

[Affinities: Fire: 60, Water: 60, Ice: 60, Wind: 60, Lightning: 60, Earth: 60, Nature: 60, Light: 60, Dark: 60, Sword: 50] [Can be upgraded with the lust point]

[Spiritual Roots: Elemental Spiritual Roots] [Earth Grade - Peak] [Can be upgraded with the lust point, and new roots can be bought in the lust store]

[Bloodline: Blood of Incubus Lord] [Mortal Grade - Peak] [Can be upgraded with lust point]

[Physique: Body of Incubus Lord] [Mortal Grade - Peak] [Can be upgraded with lust point]

[Lust points: 126,340]

[Harem Members: Ariel Aquaria, Mio Nightrider, Mia Nightrider]

[Ability: Incubus Touch, Incubus Aura, Incubus Celestial Eyes]

After he confirmed his current lust point, a sudden burst of aura exploded from Mio and Mio, then it settled down.

They slowly open their eye and look at Damon with love in their eyes. They jump onto him and rain down a flurry of kisses and his lips.

"Thank you, Damon, I love you~!" Mio said between her rain of kisses.

"I Love You! I Love You! I Love You!" While Mia just says, ’I Love You!’ after each kiss.

"Hahaha, I love you both too," he returned their kiss with a passionate one.

Then it continues for a few minutes, after they calm down, Damon checks their new status.

[Name: Mio Nightrider]

[Age: 23]

[Cultivation: Earth Spirit Realm - Fifth Level]

[Relationship: In Love]

[Interest: 250/1000]

[Chastity: Claim by Damon Arcknight]

[Lust: 0/100]

[Affinities: Dark: 50, Bow: 20]

[Spiritual Roots: Void Spiritual Roots] [Earth Grade - High]

[Bloodline: N/A]

[Physique: N/A]

[Traits: Cheerful, Natural Archer, Loyal, Airhead, Doting Big-Sister]

[Desire: "I want to be Damon’s best Big sister and satisfy all his desires."]

[Name: Mia Nightrider]

[Age: 23]

[Cultivation: Earth Spirit Realm - Fifth Level]

[Relationship: In Love]

[Interest: 540/1000]

[Chastity: Claim by Damon Arcknight]

[Lust: 0/100]

[Affinities: Dark: 50, Dagger: 20]

[Spiritual Roots: Shadow Spiritual Roots] [Earth Grade - High]

[Bloodline: N/A]

[Physique: N/A]

[Traits: Shy, Natural Assassin, Loyal, Intelligent, Close Pervert, Masochist]

[Desire: "I want to be ravaged again by Damon’s big cock..."]

’Hahaha, Mio’s Big Sister complex is getting stronger, so that’s her hidden desire. She wants someone to be pampered, and Mia lost her handsome face lover, but gain Masochist trait.’

Suddenly, they hear a knock from the outside.

"Young Ladies, Young Master, we arrived at Swift Feather City."
